errors: rule 'r'.family: must be one of ['harmony', 'melody', 'rhythm', 'voice_motion'], got 'nope'

result.description: Note-against-note (first species) counterpoint, after Fux's Gradus ad Parnassum, expressed in the shipped voice_motion + melody families. SCOPE ASSUMPTIONS (documented, not defects): the lower sounding voice is the harmonic bass, so a vertical perfect fourth (interval_class_to 5) is treated as a dissonance; melodic rules apply per analyzed voice line. What this ruleset DELIBERATELY omits because the v1 DSL cannot yet express it (each is recorded roadmap evidence, see integrations/ + ROADMAP gap D): begin/end on a perfect consonance and the contrary-stepwise final (need phrase/global scope); no voice crossing / counterpoint-above-cantus-firmus (needs cross-field comparison of a_to_midi vs b_to_midi — the DSL tests one field against a literal, never two fields against each other); no more than three consecutive parallel thirds/sixths (needs run-length over the sequence — the gap C pattern layer); a single melodic climax (needs a global max over the line). The LOCAL rules below are complete and exact.
result.name: First-species counterpoint (Fux)

result.caveat: Exploratory: 6 piece(s) is below the 30-piece floor for confirmatory induction; treat rules as hypotheses (Fisher has little power on a handful of pieces).

ruleset.description: Induced from 6 piece(s) over the voice_motion family (induction.fisher-bh.1; soft rules, Fisher's exact + BH-FDR q=0.05).
ruleset.name: induced-voice_motion

scoring_prior.source: Phase 4.6 induction slice 1 (engineering defaults; corpus calibration deferred). Apriori frequent-pattern mining over the where-lattice with closed-itemset condensation; interestingness = Fisher's exact test (one-sided, in the leverage direction) vs an independence-given-marginals null, BH-FDR corrected, behind a piece-presence min-support floor, with leverage as the effect-size tie-break. Below exploratory_floor_pieces the result is flagged exploratory (Fisher has little power on a handful of pieces).

result.caveat: Exploratory: 8 piece(s) is below the 30-piece floor for confirmatory induction; treat rules as hypotheses (Fisher has little power on a handful of pieces).

ruleset.description: Induced from 8 piece(s) over the voice_motion family (induction.fisher-bh.1; soft rules, Fisher's exact + BH-FDR q=0.05).
ruleset.name: induced-voice_motion

scoring_prior.source: Phase 4.6 induction slice 1 (engineering defaults; corpus calibration deferred). Apriori frequent-pattern mining over the where-lattice with closed-itemset condensation; interestingness = Fisher's exact test (one-sided, in the leverage direction) vs an independence-given-marginals null, BH-FDR corrected, behind a piece-presence min-support floor, with leverage as the effect-size tie-break. Below exploratory_floor_pieces the result is flagged exploratory (Fisher has little power on a handful of pieces).

result.rim_layout: pentagon: ic1..ic5 at 2π(k-1)/5 from +x; tritone (ic6) central (no direction)

description: Golden conformance outputs for the MCP tool surface (Decision 10). Language-neutral spec: any engine reproducing these (floats within rel 1e-9 / abs 1e-12) is conformant. Regenerate ONLY for intended output changes, in the same PR, so diffs are reviewable.
